use_cases: Displaying multiple time-series data lines with configurable curve interpolation
Comparing different curve algorithms for data smoothing visualization
Building analytics dashboards that require chart visualization components
Educational tool for understanding d3/visx curve interpolation methods
Creating data-rich interfaces in SaaS applications
ai_summary: A multi-line chart component built with visx that renders five time-series curves with switchable interpolation algorithms (curveNatural, curveLinear, etc.). Includes a dropdown control for selecting curve types and toggles for point visibility. Primarily used as an educational demonstration and chart building block for data visualization interfaces.
